country_attribution: multi (b): a video is counted in every country whose search surfaced it; no per-country ranking (unreliable)

top_videos_by_views.title: June 25 Matchday Recap | #FIFAWorldCup @aramco
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: This recap of the June 25 FIFA World Cup matches trended across 12 countries, including the United States, France, and Ghana. It is available to English and French-speaking audiences.
top_videos_by_views.narration_ja: 6月25日のFIFAワールドカップの試合をまとめたこの動画は、アメリカ、フランス、ガーナなど12カ国で急上昇しました。英語とフランス語で視聴可能です。

top_videos_by_views.title: Elanga delivers a stunner for Sweden! 🇸🇪 #FIFAWorldCupOnYT
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: This video features Elanga's stunning goal during the Japan versus Sweden World Cup match. It trended internationally across 12 countries for English and French-speaking viewers.
top_videos_by_views.narration_ja: ワールドカップの日本対スウェーデン戦でのエランガ選手のゴールに焦点を当てた動画です。12カ国で急上昇ランク入りし、英語とフランス語の視聴者から注目を集めました。

top_videos_by_views.title: Daizen Maeda strikes for Japan 🇯🇵 #FIFAWorldCupOnYT
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: Daizen Maeda's goal for Japan in the World Cup match against Sweden is highlighted in this clip. The video trended in 15 countries and reaches audiences in German, English, and French.
top_videos_by_views.narration_ja: ワールドカップの日本対スウェーデン戦、前田大然選手のゴールシーンです。15カ国で急上昇し、ドイツ語、英語、フランス語圏の視聴者に楽しまれています。

top_videos_by_views.title: Son VS Haaland VS Mbappe VS Messi VS Ronaldo #shorts
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: This short features football stars Son, Haaland, Mbappe, Messi, and Ronaldo. It trended in six countries including France, Australia, and the United States.
top_videos_by_views.narration_ja: ソン・フンミン、ハーランド、ムバッペ、メッシ、ロナウドといったスター選手が登場するショート動画です。フランス、オーストラリア、アメリカなど6カ国で急上昇しました。

top_videos_by_views.title: Los Sobres Del MUNDIAL de tu Amigo🤣⚠️#comedia

top_videos_by_views.title: Mbappé vs Haaland Pen Challenge 🖊️🔥 #parody #football #haaland #worldcup
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: This parody video features an Mbappé vs. Haaland penalty challenge created with CGI and AI technology. It trended across 16 countries, including Argentina, Spain, and England.

top_videos_by_views.title: Cortas a MESSI o a CRISITIANO? 😱
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: This video asks viewers to choose between Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo. It trended in six countries including Brazil and South Africa, featuring multiple languages.
